line_map.line: Ah-ah-on! ON! You can read it!
The pot is hot! The pot is hot!
The cat is on the pot! (get off!)
ON! You can read it! O-N — on! ...now you READ it!
The pot is on top! (up high!)

line_map.note: pot-cool.png still shows steam - see wrong_art

generate.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, small black ceramic pot on a wooden counter, NO steam or smoke, calm cool morning light, a striped tabby cat sitting relaxed and casual beside it, muted deep-green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic

wrong_art.issue: named 'cool' but still shows visible steam rising from the pot, contradicting the 'not hot / phew, all is calm' lyric beat
wrong_art.fix: regenerate with no steam and a visibly relaxed cat (see generate entry pot-cool-v2.png)
wrong_art.mj_prompt: dark forest editorial photography, small black ceramic pot on a wooden counter, NO steam, calm cool morning light, a striped tabby cat sitting relaxed beside it, muted green background, cinematic Montessori dark-trap aesthetic
